Become a Founding Member

Building a bridge
between Europe and
the Kamëntsá people

We are creating a European NGO to support the living traditions, territorial rights, and self-determined projects of the Kamëntsá people in the Sibundoy Valley, Colombia.

Our Mission

We Connect

We build respectful and lasting partnerships between Europe and Indigenous communities.

We Support

We support Indigenous-led initiatives that strengthen culture, territory, education, health, and environmental protection.

We Empower

We promote self-determination and create opportunities for future generations.

We Transparently Steward

We ensure ethical governance, transparency, and accountable use of resources.

Why It Matters

A remarkable culture.
Still largely unheard.

The Kamëntsá people of the Sibundoy Valley carry one of the richest living traditions in the Andes and Amazon.

Yet outside Colombia, their voice remains largely unheard.

This is not because their wisdom is less valuable.
It is because they have had fewer bridges connecting them to the world.

We believe that can change.

Be part of something meaningful.

The Next Step

Help us found this bridge

We are currently establishing the legal foundation of the NGO in Europe. We are inviting a small group of committed individuals to become founding members and help shape the vision, structure, and impact from the very beginning.

Become a Founding Member Learn more about the founding process →

Help build a bridge that will last for generations.

What We Stand For

  • Respect
  • Reciprocity
  • Integrity
  • Cultural Preservation
  • Care for the Earth

Where We Begin

Our first focus is the Sibundoy Valley, working alongside the Kamëntsá people and the Muchavisoy family's vision through Vinyiabtumayokan.

Learn more about the valley →
